data.title: Joby Vs. Archer Vs. Blade: Which eVTOL Stock Is Ready For Takeoff?
data.description: Future of eVTOL uncertain as investors eye FAA approvals, cash burn, and market feasibility. Archer, Joby, and Blade have mixed outlook, slow ascent.

data.title: What's Going On With D-Wave Quantum Stock Today?
data.description: D-Wave Quantum sees a slight premarket gain following a partnership with Staque to develop a hybrid-quantum application for autonomous agriculture.

data.title: State Pension Funds Key To Bitcoin Hitting $500K, Long-Only Money Needed: Standard Chartered
data.description: Bitcoin‘s (CRYPTO: BTC) path to reaching $500,000 before President Donald Trump leaves office hinges on long-term investment from state pension funds.

data.title: Venture Global's Pullback Presents Big Opportunity, Analyst Says
data.description: Analyst sees major upside potential in Venture Global LNG, citing its disruptive model, fast execution, and exposure to favorable LNG spreads.

data.title: Nissin warns of steep profit slide but sees solid core business
data.description:
Key Takeaways:


	Nissin Foods projected that profits for 2024 would fall between 38% and 41%
	But other figures show that underlying revenue from China grew nearly 10% in the first nine months of last year


  

By Lee Shih Ta
